title: Phase-3 Synthesis Output Schema
description: Schema for Phase-3 (Semiotic Synthesis) consuming Phase-2 UX outputs and emitting structural syntheses using LNCP-mapped Peircean semiotics. Phase-3 brings multiple Phase-1 outputs into relation without recomputing metrics.

synthesis_scope.description: Phase-3 syntheses are bounded to the sample; no generalization beyond the input.

interpretive_frame.description: Interpretive framework: LNCP theory mapped through Peircean semiotics.

syntheses.description: Array of synthesis objects, each bringing multiple Phase-1/2 outputs into semiotic relation.

synthesis_id.description: Deterministic ID, e.g., SYN_01, SYN_02, ... Sequential, 1-indexed, zero-padded to 2 digits.

related_outputs.description: Phase-2 output IDs that this synthesis brings into relation.

semiotic_lens.description: The Peircean semiotic lens applied to this synthesis.

synthesis_text.description: The synthesis narrative. Must use structural language only, remain sample-bounded, and not make diagnostic or trait claims.
